description_long: This doll features a large, round head with oversized, pixelated eyes and a small, smiling mouth, reminiscent of a cartoon character. The hair is bright yellow, styled in a long ponytail that extends down the back, secured with a red heart-shaped hair tie. Two prominent, pointed bows—one black and one red—sit atop the head, adding a playful touch. The doll wears a black dress with a pink belt and white tights, complemented by black shoes. The arms are short and rounded, with one arm slightly raised. The overall design is stylized and vibrant, with smooth, matte surfaces and bold, contrasting colors.
description: A stylized doll with a large head, yellow ponytail, oversized eyes, and a black dress with a pink belt, featuring bold bows and a playful cartoon appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's large eyes, smiling mouth, and the black and red bows on top of the head.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the long yellow ponytail and the red heart-shaped hair tie, with one bow visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the ponytail and the heart-shaped hair tie, with the back of the head and dress visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear view shows the ponytail's curve, the side of the face, and the transition from hair to dress.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a simple black sleeveless dress with a pink belt, white tights, and black shoes, reflecting a classic cartoon-inspired look with no visible patterns or brand influences.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with its head facing forward, one arm slightly raised and the other resting by its side, legs together and straight, and the long ponytail extending down the back.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a smiling expression with large, wide-open eyes and a small, curved mouth, giving a cheerful and friendly appearance.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight yellow hair styled in a high ponytail secured with a red heart-shaped hair tie, with two large bows (one black, one red) on top of the head.
